metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2207
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.2: "In homogenates prepared from neurons in primary culture, WWL70 inhibited ~50% of the total [3H]-2-AG hydrolysis (Fig. 2d)"

In cortical layer 5 pyramidal neurons, inhibition of ABDH6 promotes induction of CB1-dependent long-term depression (eCB-LTD) at excitatory synapses using a subthreshold stimulation protocol (Figure 6). This effect is blocked by the CB1 receptor antagonist AM251 demonstrating the action of 2-AG on the presynaptic CB1 receptor (Figure 6).

In cultured neurons, 2-AG hydrolysis under basal or stimulated conditions significantly decreases upon inhibition of ABDH6 activity using WWL70 (Figure 3, Supplementary Figure 4).

15/12/2017 Pim
- The retrograde transsynaptic signaling aspect of the endocanabiniod signaling in the preparation featured in this paper has been shown in another paper (PMID:17684555): "Sub-threshold stimulation of pyramidal neurons in layer 2 of this brain area induces eCB-dependent LTD (eCB-LTD) in layer 5 when a non-specific inhibitor of 2-AG hydrolysis, URB602, is added.". Experimental description: Electron microscopy: C57BL/6 mice; adulte, cortical layers 4-5 (Fig 5)
Cell type and synapse type immunostaining: C57BL/6 mouse cortical sections (sup. Fig 9)
neuronal culture: Mouse neurons and microglia in primary culture...Briefly, for neurons,
one day-old mouse brains (C57BL/6) were collected, and their meninges and cerebellum removed. The remaining brain tissue was chopped and the cells dissociated and plated in 10-cm dishes...
Electrophysiology: Mouse brain slices (C57BL/6, ~8 wks old, 300 μm) were prepared as described32. In brief, immediately after cutting, slices containing the prefrontal cortex were stored for ~30 min....
